'''falozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagocele|oesophagocele]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagocele|oesophagocele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| falozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fælezeth|fælezeth]] || [[word:fælezej|fælezej]] || [[word:fælezesh|fælezesh]] || [[word:fæleze|fæleze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:falolozoth|falolozoth]] || [[word:falolozoj|falolozoj]] || [[word:falolozosh|falolozosh]] || [[word:falolozo|falolozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:falozoth|falozoth]] || [[word:falozoj|falozoj]] || [[word:falozosh|falozosh]] || [[word:falozo|falozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:falofzoth|falofzoth]] || [[word:falofzoj|falofzoj]] || [[word:falofzosh|falofzosh]] || [[word:falofzof|falofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:falozotho|falozotho]] || [[word:falozojo|falozojo]] || [[word:falozosho|falozosho]] || [[word:falozoko|falozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:falozoth|falozoth]] || [[word:falozoj|falozoj]] || [[word:falozosh|falozosh]] || [[word:falozo|falozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:falozothol|falozothol]] || [[word:falozojol|falozojol]] || [[word:falozoshol|falozoshol]] || [[word:falozokol|falozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:falozothotho|falozothotho]] || [[word:falozojojo|falozojojo]] || [[word:falozoshosho|falozoshosho]] || [[word:falozoko|falozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:falozothon|falozothon]] || [[word:falozojon|falozojon]] || [[word:falozoshon|falozoshon]] || [[word:falozokon|falozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:falozothoro|falozothoro]] || [[word:falozojoro|falozojoro]] || [[word:falozoshoro|falozoshoro]] || [[word:falozokoro|falozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
